title: Agent Metrics Real-Time

acceptance_criteria_testability.rationale: All ACs are specific, measurable, and testable. 'Displays agents from GET /api/metrics endpoint' is testable via API inspection. 'Updates every 5 seconds' is verifiable in DevTools. 'Last updated X seconds ago' is UI-verifiable.

no_invented_features.rationale: Every feature traces to explicit AC or implementation note. No invented features. Story follows exactly what's in dashboard prototype and API design.

pattern_consistency.rationale: Follows exact pattern: Hook (useRealAgentMetrics) → useQuery → Component. Same pattern used in 3.11, 3.12, 3.13, 3.14, 3.15. Consistent with existing dashboard patterns (useDashboard, useAgents).

brownfield_context_respected.rationale: Explicitly reuses metricsService (not reinventing). Updates existing components (AgentsMonitor, AgentMonitorCard) rather than creating new ones. Respects existing dashboard architecture and styling.

real_data_emphasis.rationale: Story eliminates all mock data. Every metric comes from Supabase via /api/metrics. Clear 'LIVE' badge distinguishes real data. Testing strategy emphasizes real Supabase data.

backend_frontend_scope_clarity.rationale: Zero backend work needed (metricsService already exists and returns real data). Frontend work clearly scoped: 3 files modified (AgentsMonitor, AgentMonitorCard, useApiMetrics hook). No ambiguity.

reasoning: Story 3.10 is a strong foundation story for Wave 5. It's SIMPLE complexity (7/25 pts), has clear AC, eliminates mock data, and follows proven patterns. Specification is detailed, testing strategy is comprehensive. Foundation for all remaining Wave 5 stories. No revisions needed.
critical_notes: This is the foundation story — approving this unblocks 3.11, 3.12, 3.13, 3.14, 3.15
metricsService already verified working with real Supabase data
No architectural conflicts with other stories
Pattern (Hook → useQuery → Component) is exact match for 3.11-3.15
dev_notes: Test API endpoint with curl before connecting to component
Use existing AgentsSkeleton component for loading state
Leverage existing error toast pattern from dashboard
